title: PvP Additions
description: Additions for Vanilla PvP with some quality of life features and settings
body:
If you have a PvP Server/Network or just want PvP Settings on your server, this is exactly what you need.
PvP Additions adds quality of life features and settings for PvP.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- What does PvP Additions add?

  -If you want players to be able to use shields, do /PvPAdditions:EnableShield true

  -If you want players to be able to heal, do /PvPAdditions:EnableHealing true

  -If you want players to be able to do critical hits, do /PvPAdditions:EnableCrits true

  -If you want PvP Enabled, do /PvPAdditions:EnablePvP true

  -If you want players to be able to use totems, do /PvPAdditions:EnableTotems true

  -If you want to disable welcome tips, do /PvPAdditions:EnableWelcomeTips false

  -If you want players to be able to use ender pearls, do /PvPAdditions:EnablePearls true

  -If you want players to be able to use Bowsn'Crossbows, do /PvPAdditions:EnableBows true

  -If you want players to be able to use tridents, do /PvPAdditions:EnableTridents true

  -If you want players to be able to use elytras, do /PvPAdditions:EnableElytra true

All of these tips are sent to an OP when they join the game, unless you do /PvPAdditions:EnableWelcomeTips false

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Other Possibles Setups

  If you want a further setup of your server, you can use my other projects to help you do that. I'll link 
  some of them here.
  - No Block Breaking: https://modrinth.com/mod/no-block-breaking-for-you
  - No Block Placing: https://modrinth.com/mod/no-block-placing-for-you
  - No Item Dropping: https://modrinth.com/mod/no-dropping-for-you
  - No Chat: https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-for-you
  - No Dimensions: https://modrinth.com/mod/no-dimensions

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Coming Soon

   - Easily accessible GUI Configuration Screen

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Why you should use PvP Additions

   - EASY to use and setup
   - NO NEED for a server restart after changing settings
   - Fast and Optimal for servers
   - Reliable and Often Updated
   - Available for changes and more on Discord

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can use this in servers. 
If you need any help, contact me on discord.
You can find the Source Code on Github
